pi_items.source: setup_nosh.sh:175 - INSERT INTO users statement creates user with username='demo_provider'
setup_nosh.sh:175 - INSERT INTO users statement sets displayname='Dr. James Carter' for demo_provider user (id=2)
setup_nosh.sh:189 - INSERT INTO providers statement initializes schedule_increment='20' for provider id=2 (demo_provider)
verifier.py:25 and task description - Task expects agent to update schedule_increment to 15 minutes

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic NOSH EHR system. The target provider is demo_provider with display name Dr. James Carter (user id=2, provider id=2). The provider's schedule_increment is initialized to 20 minutes in the database during setup. The task expects this value to be changed to 15 minutes. The database is populated entirely via setup scripts (setup_nosh.sh and patients.sql), using synthetic data generated for testing.
